event: Dogs Playing Cards at a Table
symbols: anthropomorphic dogs — humorous commentary on human social behavior
poker table — games of chance and deception
description: A group of five or six dogs of various breeds sit around a green felt poker table, holding playing cards in their paws. One dog appears to be snarling or barking while another looks on smugly. Poker chips and cards are scattered on the table. A hanging lamp illuminates the scene from above. The background shows red walls with framed pictures. The atmosphere mimics a smoky card room.
